description: A designed quote-card graphic. The right two-thirds is a color photograph of Vice President JD Vance in a navy suit and red tie, smiling and waving with his right arm raised, standing in front of a large American flag in an industrial/hangar event setting. The left third is overlaid with a translucent blue gradient panel carrying a pull-quote in a white serif font: ''We are bringing the United States of America back — We decided to put American businesses &, most importantly, American workers first.'' Below the quote, in spaced gold/tan small caps, the attribution reads 'VICE PRESIDENT VANCE'. The clean blue-and-white patriotic palette, formal serif typography and triumphant waving pose are used to project optimism and an 'America First' economic message. Target audience: general public and administration supporters; the tweet adds 'President Trump and Vice President Vance are fighting for YOU'.
notable_text: 'We are bringing the United States of America back — We decided to put American businesses &, most importantly, American workers first.' — VICE PRESIDENT VANCE
